examples.title: Backpropagation Algorithm
examples.description: Weight update process in neural networks
examples.code:
ALGORITHM Backpropagation
BEGIN
  Forward pass: Compute outputs
  Calculate loss
  Backward pass:
    Compute gradients ∂Loss/∂Weights
    Update weights: W = W - η*∇W
END
examples.explanation: Iteratively adjusts weights using gradient descent

examples.title: Simple Neural Network with Keras
examples.code:
from keras.models import Sequential
from keras.layers import Dense

model = Sequential()
model.add(Dense(64, activation='relu', input_dim=100))
model.add(Dense(10, activation='softmax'))
model.compile(loss='categorical_crossentropy', optimizer='adam')
examples.explanation: Demonstrates layer stacking and model configuration
